research_context: GuardAlign models image patch embeddings and unsafe text embeddings as two discrete distributions to compute patch-level suspiciousness using Optimal Transport.
goal: To compute patch-level suspiciousness scores by minimizing the transport cost between image patches and unsafe text embeddings using entropic optimal transport.

inputs.image_patches: Tensor of shape (M, D) representing M image patch embeddings
inputs.text_embeddings: Tensor of shape (N, D) representing N unsafe text embeddings

outputs.patch_scores: Tensor of shape (M,) representing the suspiciousness score for each image patch
outputs.transport_plan: Tensor of shape (M, N) representing the optimal transport coupling matrix

symbols.C: Cost matrix based on cosine distance

core_steps: Normalize input embeddings to unit length for cosine similarity calculation.
Compute the pairwise cosine distance cost matrix C between image patches and text embeddings.
Apply the Sinkhorn algorithm to compute the entropic optimal transport plan T.
Calculate patch-level suspiciousness scores by summing the element-wise product of T and C over the text dimension.

functions.name: compute_cosine_cost_matrix
functions.purpose: Calculates the pairwise cosine distance between two sets of embeddings.

functions.name: sinkhorn_algorithm
functions.purpose: Computes the optimal transport plan using entropic regularization.
functions.paper_step_mapping: Implements the computation of T via Sinkhorn for entropic OT

functions.name: calculate_patch_suspiciousness
functions.purpose: Aggregates transport cost to determine patch-level scores.
functions.paper_step_mapping: Implements equation patch_score(m) = sum_n T(m,n) * C(m,n)

engineering_assumptions: Uniform marginal distributions (weights) are assumed for both image patches and text embeddings since specific weights are not provided.
The entropy regularization parameter (epsilon) is a tunable hyperparameter.
Input embeddings are assumed to be pre-normalized or will be normalized internally.
ambiguity_notes: The paper excerpt does not specify the value for the entropy regularization coefficient.
The specific definition of 'unsafe text embeddings' implies a pre-existing embedding model, which is treated as an external input.

reference_libraries.name: POT
reference_libraries.role: Optional reference oracle for validating Sinkhorn implementation

reference_libraries.name: GeomLoss
reference_libraries.role: Optional reference oracle for differentiable OT backend

required_tests.name: cost_matrix_properties
required_tests.purpose: Verify the cost matrix calculation is correct and bounded.
required_tests.expected_property: Cost matrix values should be in range [0, 2] for cosine distance.

required_tests.name: transport_marginals
required_tests.purpose: Ensure the Sinkhorn algorithm produces a valid transport plan.
required_tests.expected_property: The sum of rows and columns of the transport plan T should match the source and target marginals (within tolerance).

required_tests.name: patch_score_aggregation
required_tests.purpose: Verify the patch score calculation logic.

must_have: Synthetic generation of image patch and text embeddings on CPU.
optional: Visualization of the cost matrix or transport plan.
out_of_scope: Loading real images or text data.
